commands.review_summary:
The PR removes forced-consult diagnostic text from Discord realtime agent prompts and voice-call consult args, then updates forced-consult regression expectations.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows the forced fallback paths append or pass the internal consult-policy diagnostic into model-facing agent input.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed for real behavior proof or an explicit maintainer override; there is no concrete code repair for automation to make from this review.

target.title: fix(discord): keep forced voice consult diagnostics private
target.body:
Summary
- Stop forced Discord realtime consult fallbacks from appending internal consult-policy diagnostics to the agent-facing voice prompt.
- Apply the same private-diagnostic treatment to phone-call realtime forced consults.
- Add Discord voice regression coverage and update voice-call expectations; add an Unreleased changelog entry.

Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-voice-call.config.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Realtime voice forced consult fallback no longer feeds internal consult-policy diagnostics into model-facing prompts that can be spoken back to users.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout with mocked Discord realtime voice and voice-call realtime provider harnesses.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the two Vitest commands listed above after moving the patch onto a clean branch from origin/main.
Evidence after fix: Discord regression asserts the agent command message is exactly `What?` and does not contain `consultPolicy` or `openclaw_agent_consult`; voice-call tests assert forced consult args include only the caller question.
Observed result after fix: Discord voice e2e file passed; voice-call extension test lane passed; diff whitespace check passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
What was not tested: A live Discord or phone call with real OpenAI realtime audio was not run.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
